instructions_to_main_agent: Design a high-end streetwear e-commerce frontend named 'AITHERIOS'. Use deep blacks (Obsidian) and bold red accents.
Implement ultra-heavy animations: framer-motion page transitions, custom cursors (oversized dot with inversion), scroll-triggered reveals, parallax effects, and marquee/ticker tapes.
Typography: Use a heavy display sans-serif (e.g., Anton or Bebas Neue) for headlines. Use Space Grotesk for body text and mono/tech elements. Do NOT use Inter or Roboto.
Build brutalist layouts: Sharp edges (rounded-none), thick borders (1px solid #262626), raw editorial grids, and apply grain/glitch textures.
Add 'data-testid' to ALL interactive elements for automated testing.
Mock all backend data locally (e-commerce catalog, user profile, cart state). No real backend is needed.

Implement these pages: Home, Shop/Collection (with filters), Product Detail (gallery, zoom, variants), Cart Drawer/Page, Checkout UI (multi-step), Lookbook, Login/Signup, Account (orders, wishlist), Wishlist, Search Overlay, 404, Drops/Collections.
Use standard HTML + Tailwind for marketing/home layouts. Heavily customize Shadcn components (strip out soft Vercel look, make them sharp and brutalist) for forms, selects, and dialogs.
Ensure 'Lenis' is used for smooth momentum scrolling to achieve a premium feel.
Avoid default soft shadows. Use hard dropshadows or purely flat layered borders.

spacing_and_layout.philosophy: Generous Spacing, Asymmetric Bento Grids, Mobile-First. High visual tension.

motion_and_interactions.cursor: Custom oversized dot cursor with blending-mode difference.
motion_and_interactions.page_transition: Framer Motion slide-up with opacity fade.
motion_and_interactions.hover_effects: High-contrast text color shift, sharp 1px border highlights, slight scale-up.
motion_and_interactions.marquees: Slow moving editorial ribbon with tracking-wide uppercase text.

component_guidelines.buttons: Sharp corners (rounded-none), thick borders, hover fills with solid red. High contrast.
component_guidelines.cards: Cardless or 1px solid border (#262626), flat background, no soft shadows.
component_guidelines.navigation: Sticky, glassmorphism (bg-black/60 backdrop-blur-xl) or solid black with bottom border. Must include mega-menu or clean dropdowns for Shop/Lookbook.
component_guidelines.inputs: Flat, bottom border only or sharp 1px solid borders. No rounded corners.
